title: parastranthus flavus
side_effects: Parastranthus flavus can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, nausea, and headaches in individuals with sensitive systems. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and vomiting due to its high alkaloid content. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also cause respiratory problems, such as asthma-like symptoms and shortness of breath. Furthermore, improper preparation and dosing of the plant can lead to interactions with other medications, potentially exacerbating underlying health conditions.
